## 📊 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 🧹 Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security enhancement

## 🔧 Configuration Changes

<!-- If this PR includes configuration changes, describe them here -->
- [ ] Environment variables added/modified
- [ ] New dependencies added
- [ ] AWS configuration changes
- [ ] Scraper configuration updates

## 📝 Checklist

### Before submitting this PR, please make sure:

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review of code has been completed
- [ ] Code is commented, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] Corresponding changes to documentation have been made
- [ ] No new warnings are generated
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] All dependencies are properly documented

### For new features:

- [ ] Feature is properly documented
- [ ] Example usage is provided
- [ ] Error handling is implemented
- [ ] Logging is appropriate

### For bug fixes:

- [ ] Root cause is identified
- [ ] Fix is minimal and targeted
- [ ] Regression tests are added
- [ ] Issue is properly documented

## 🚀 Deployment Notes

<!-- Any special deployment considerations -->

- [ ] No breaking changes to existing functionality
- [ ] Database migrations (if any) are backward compatible
- [ ] Environment variables are documented
- [ ] AWS Lambda deployment tested (if applicable)
